scripts.build: dotnet build && npm --prefix vueapp1.client run build
scripts.check: npm --prefix vueapp1.client run check && dotnet build && npm run openapi:check && node scripts/run-dotnet-test.mjs --no-build
scripts.setup: npm run install-githooks && npm ci --prefix vueapp1.client && npm --prefix vueapp1.client run rebuild-trusted && dotnet restore --locked-mode && dotnet tool restore
scripts.check:fast: npm --prefix vueapp1.client run check:fast && dotnet build && npm run openapi:check && node scripts/run-dotnet-test.mjs --no-build
